title: Groups

detail.noExpensesDescription: Add an expense to get started.
detail.venmoPaymentConfirm: Did you complete the Venmo payment of {amount} to {name}?
detail.notFoundDescription: This group doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
detail.archivedMessage: This group is archived. Expenses cannot be added.

settings.title: Group Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
settings.archivedOn: Archived on {date}. Expenses cannot be added.
settings.addMemberDescription: Add someone to the group who doesn't have an account yet. They can be assigned expenses and will show up in splits. If they sign up later, their data can be merged into their real account.
settings.archiveDescription: Archive this group to hide it from your dashboard. You can unarchive it at any time.
settings.archiveConfirm: Archive this group? It will be hidden from your dashboard.
settings.deleteDescription: Deleting a group removes all expenses, settlements, and member data permanently.

settle.title: Record a payment
settle.description: Record a payment between two group members.

invite.title: Invite to group
invite.description: Generate an invite link to share with friends. Links expire after 7 days.
invite.linkInfo: Anyone with this link can join the group.

emptyDescription: Create your first group to start splitting expenses with friends.
